117: function parseNumber(value: unknown, fallback: number, min: number, max: number): number {
118:   const source = typeof value === 'number' && Number.isFinite(value) ? value : fallback;
119:   const n = Math.floor(source);
120:   if (n < min) {
121:     return min;
122:   }
123:   if (n > max) {
124:     return max;
125:   }
126:   return n;
127: }
128: 
129: function parseIntegerString(value: string | undefined, fallback: number, min: number, max: number): number {
130:   if (value === undefined) {
131:     return fallback;
132:   }
133:   const parsed = Number.parseInt(value.trim(), 10);
134:   if (Number.isNaN(parsed)) {
135:     return fallback;
136:   }
137:   if (parsed < min) {
138:     return min;
139:   }
140:   if (parsed > max) {
141:     return max;
142:   }
143:   return parsed;
144: }
145: 
146: function parseBooleanString(value: string | undefined, fallback: boolean): boolean {
147:   if (value === undefined) {
148:     return fallback;
149:   }
150:   const normalized = value.trim().toLowerCase();
151:   if (['1', 'true', 'yes', 'on'].includes(normalized)) {
152:     return true;
153:   }
154:   if (['0', 'false', 'no', 'off'].includes(normalized)) {
155:     return false;
156:   }
157:   return fallback;
158: }

160: function normalizeToolPolicy(input: Record<string, unknown> | null): TaskToolPolicy {
161:   const commands = (input?.commands ?? {}) as Record<string, unknown>;
162:   const allowRaw = Array.isArray(commands.allow) ? commands.allow : [];
163:   const denyRaw = Array.isArray(commands.deny) ? commands.deny : [];
164:   const limits = (input?.limits ?? {}) as Record<string, unknown>;
165: 
166:   const commandAllow = allowRaw
167:     .filter((value): value is string => typeof value === 'string')
168:     .map((value) => value.trim())
169:     .filter((value) => value.length > 0);
170: 
171:   const commandDeny = denyRaw
172:     .filter((value): value is string => typeof value === 'string')
173:     .map((value) => value.trim())
174:     .filter((value) => value.length > 0);
175: 
176:   const maxCommandTimeoutMs = parseNumber(limits.maxCommandTimeoutMs, MAX_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS, 1_000, MAX_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS);
177:   const maxOutputBytes = parseNumber(limits.maxOutputBytes, 32_000, 1_024, 512_000);
178: 
179:   return {
180:     commandAllow,
181:     commandDeny,
182:     maxCommandTimeoutMs,
183:     maxOutputBytes,
184:   };
185: }

187: class ScriptedAgentProvider implements AgentProvider {
188:   private readonly actions: AgentAction[];
189: 
190:   constructor(actions: AgentAction[]) {
191:     this.actions = actions;
192:   }
193: 
194:   async next(input: { step: number }): Promise<AgentAction> {
195:     if (input.step - 1 >= this.actions.length) {
196:       return { type: 'final', summary: 'Scripted task completed' };
197:     }
198: 
199:     return this.actions[input.step - 1];
200:   }
201: }

203: class CloudflareAgentSdkProvider implements AgentProvider {
204:   constructor(
205:     private readonly endpoint: string,
206:     private readonly authToken: string | null
207:   ) {}
208: 
209:   async next(input: {
210:     prompt: string;
211:     model: string;
212:     maxSteps: number;
213:     step: number;
214:     history: AgentHistoryEntry[];
215:   }): Promise<AgentAction> {
216:     const response = await fetch(this.endpoint, {
217:       method: 'POST',
218:       headers: {
219:         'Content-Type': 'application/json',
220:         ...(this.authToken ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${this.authToken}` } : {}),
221:       },
222:       body: JSON.stringify({
223:         mode: 'workspace_task',
224:         prompt: input.prompt,
225:         model: input.model,
226:         maxSteps: input.maxSteps,
227:         step: input.step,
228:         history: input.history,
229:       }),
230:     });
231: 
232:     if (!response.ok) {
233:       if (response.status >= 500 || response.status === 429) {
234:         throw new QueueRetryError(`Cloudflare Agent SDK request failed with status ${response.status}`);
235:       }
236:       throw new Error(`Cloudflare Agent SDK request failed with status ${response.status}`);
237:     }
238: 
239:     const parsed = (await response.json()) as unknown;
240:     if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) {
241:       throw new Error('Cloudflare Agent SDK returned invalid payload');
242:     }
243: 
244:     const action = (parsed as { action?: unknown }).action;
245:     if (!action || typeof action !== 'object' || Array.isArray(action)) {
246:       throw new Error('Cloudflare Agent SDK response missing action');
247:     }
248: 
249:     return validateAgentAction(action);
250:   }
251: }
252: 
253: function validateAgentAction(action: unknown): AgentAction {
254:   if (!action || typeof action !== 'object' || Array.isArray(action)) {
255:     throw new PolicyError('invalid_action', 'Agent action must be an object');
256:   }
257: 
258:   const record = action as Record<string, unknown>;
259:   if (record.type === 'final') {
260:     const summary = typeof record.summary === 'string' ? record.summary.trim() : '';
261:     if (!summary) {
262:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_action', 'Final action requires a non-empty summary');
263:     }
264:     return { type: 'final', summary };
265:   }
266: 
267:   if (record.type !== 'tool') {
268:     throw new PolicyError('invalid_action', 'Action type must be tool or final');
269:   }
270: 
271:   const tool = typeof record.tool === 'string' ? record.tool : '';
272:   const args =
273:     record.args && typeof record.args === 'object' && !Array.isArray(record.args)
274:       ? (record.args as Record<string, unknown>)
275:       : {};
276: 
277:   switch (tool) {
278:     case 'list_files':
279:       if (args.path !== undefined && typeof args.path !== 'string') {
280:         throw new PolicyError('invalid_action', 'list_files.path must be a string when provided');
281:       }
282:       return {
283:         type: 'tool',
284:         tool,
285:         args,
286:       } as AgentAction;
287:     case 'read_file':
288:       if (typeof args.path !== 'string' || !args.path.trim()) {
289:         throw new PolicyError('invalid_action', 'read_file.path is required');
290:       }
291:       if (args.maxBytes !== undefined && (typeof args.maxBytes !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(args.maxBytes))) {
292:         throw new PolicyError('invalid_action', 'read_file.maxBytes must be a number when provided');
293:       }
294:       return {
295:         type: 'tool',
296:         tool,
297:         args,
298:       } as AgentAction;
299:     case 'write_file':
300:       if (typeof args.path !== 'string' || !args.path.trim()) {
301:         throw new PolicyError('invalid_action', 'write_file.path is required');
302:       }
303:       if (typeof args.content !== 'string') {
304:         throw new PolicyError('invalid_action', 'write_file.content must be a string');
305:       }
306:       return {
307:         type: 'tool',
308:         tool,
309:         args,
310:       } as AgentAction;
311:     case 'run_command':
312:       if (typeof args.command !== 'string' || !args.command.trim()) {
313:         throw new PolicyError('invalid_action', 'run_command.command is required');
314:       }
315:       if (args.timeoutMs !== undefined && (typeof args.timeoutMs !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(args.timeoutMs))) {
316:         throw new PolicyError('invalid_action', 'run_command.timeoutMs must be a number when provided');
317:       }
318:       return {
319:         type: 'tool',
320:         tool,
321:         args,
322:       } as AgentAction;
323:     case 'diff_summary':
324:       if (args.maxBytes !== undefined && (typeof args.maxBytes !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(args.maxBytes))) {
325:         throw new PolicyError('invalid_action', 'diff_summary.maxBytes must be a number when provided');
326:       }
327:       return {
328:         type: 'tool',
329:         tool,
330:         args,
331:       } as AgentAction;
332:     default:
333:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_tool', `Tool '${tool}' is not supported`);
334:   }
335: }

350: function enforceCommandPolicy(command: string, policy: TaskToolPolicy): void {
351:   const trimmed = command.trim();
352:   if (!trimmed) {
353:     throw new PolicyError('command_not_allowed', 'Command cannot be empty');
354:   }
355: 
356:   const normalizedCommand = trimmed.toLowerCase();
357:   if (policy.commandDeny.some((entry) => normalizedCommand.includes(entry.toLowerCase()))) {
358:     throw new PolicyError('command_denied', 'Command denied by policy');
359:   }
360: 
361:   if (/[;&|`<>\n\r]/.test(trimmed) || /\$\(|\)\s*\{/.test(trimmed)) {
362:     throw new PolicyError('command_denied', 'Command contains denied shell metacharacters');
363:   }
364: 
365:   const allowEntries = policy.commandAllow;
366:   const allowed = allowEntries.some((entry) => {
367:     const normalizedEntry = entry.toLowerCase();
368:     if (normalizedEntry.includes(' ')) {
369:       return normalizedCommand === normalizedEntry || normalizedCommand.startsWith(`${normalizedEntry} `);
370:     }
371:     return normalizedCommand === normalizedEntry;
372:   });
373:   if (!allowed) {
374:     throw new PolicyError('command_not_allowed', 'Command is not in allowlist');
375:   }
376: }

378: async function runSandboxCommand(
379:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
380:   command: string,
381:   timeout?: number
382: ): Promise<{ stdout: string; stderr: string }> {
383:   const result = await sandbox.exec(command, { timeout });
384:   if (result.exitCode !== 0) {
385:     const output = [result.stdout, result.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
386:     throw new Error(`Sandbox command failed with exit ${result.exitCode}: ${output || 'No output'}`);
387:   }
388:   return { stdout: result.stdout, stderr: result.stderr };
389: }

391: async function executeTool(
392:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
393:   action: Extract<AgentAction, { type: 'tool' }>,
394:   maxCommandTimeoutMs: number,
395:   policy: TaskToolPolicy
396: ): Promise<unknown> {
397:   if (action.tool === 'list_files') {
398:     const absolutePath = assertWorkspacePath(action.args.path ?? '.');
399:     const output = await runSandboxCommand(
400:       sandbox,
401:       `python3 - ${shellQuote(absolutePath)} <<'PY'\nimport json\nimport os\nimport sys\n\npath = sys.argv[1]\nif not os.path.exists(path):\n    print(json.dumps({'error':'not_found'}))\n    raise SystemExit(0)\nentries = []\nfor name in sorted(os.listdir(path)):\n    full = os.path.join(path, name)\n    entries.append({'name': name, 'type': 'directory' if os.path.isdir(full) else 'file'})\nprint(json.dumps({'entries': entries[:500]}))\nPY`
402:     );
403:     return JSON.parse(output.stdout || '{}');
404:   }
405: 
406:   if (action.tool === 'read_file') {
407:     const absolutePath = assertWorkspacePath(action.args.path);
408:     const maxBytes = parseNumber(action.args.maxBytes, 200_000, 1, 2_000_000);
409:     const output = await runSandboxCommand(
410:       sandbox,
411:       `python3 - ${shellQuote(absolutePath)} ${maxBytes} <<'PY'\nimport json\nimport os\nimport sys\n\npath = sys.argv[1]\nmax_bytes = int(sys.argv[2])\nif not os.path.exists(path):\n    print(json.dumps({'error':'not_found'}))\n    raise SystemExit(0)\nwith open(path, 'rb') as f:\n    data = f.read(max_bytes + 1)\ntruncated = len(data) > max_bytes\nif truncated:\n    data = data[:max_bytes]\ntext = data.decode('utf-8', errors='replace')\nprint(json.dumps({'content': text, 'truncated': truncated, 'bytes': len(data)}))\nPY`
412:     );
413:     return JSON.parse(output.stdout || '{}');
414:   }
415: 
416:   if (action.tool === 'write_file') {
417:     const absolutePath = assertWorkspacePath(action.args.path);
418:     const directory = absolutePath.slice(0, absolutePath.lastIndexOf('/')) || WORKSPACE_ROOT;
419:     await runSandboxCommand(sandbox, `mkdir -p ${shellQuote(directory)}`);
420:     await sandbox.writeFile(absolutePath, action.args.content);
421:     return { ok: true, path: action.args.path, bytes: new TextEncoder().encode(action.args.content).length };
422:   }
423: 
424:   if (action.tool === 'run_command') {
425:     enforceCommandPolicy(action.args.command, policy);
426:     const timeout = parseNumber(action.args.timeoutMs, DEFAULT_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS, 1_000, maxCommandTimeoutMs);
427:     const output = await runSandboxCommand(
428:       sandbox,
429:       `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && ${action.args.command}`,
430:       timeout
431:     );
432:     return {
433:       stdout: output.stdout.slice(0, policy.maxOutputBytes),
434:       stderr: output.stderr.slice(0, policy.maxOutputBytes),
435:       truncated: output.stdout.length > policy.maxOutputBytes || output.stderr.length > policy.maxOutputBytes,
436:     };
437:   }
438: 
439:   if (action.tool === 'diff_summary') {
440:     const maxBytes = parseNumber(action.args.maxBytes, 128_000, 1_024, policy.maxOutputBytes);
441:     const output = await runSandboxCommand(
442:       sandbox,
443:       `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && git diff --name-status && echo '__NIMBUS_PATCH__' && git diff`
444:     );
445:     const marker = '__NIMBUS_PATCH__';
446:     const markerIndex = output.stdout.indexOf(marker);
447:     const header = markerIndex >= 0 ? output.stdout.slice(0, markerIndex).trim() : '';
448:     const patch = markerIndex >= 0 ? output.stdout.slice(markerIndex + marker.length).trim() : output.stdout.trim();
449:     return {
450:       changedFiles: header ? header.split(/\r?\n/).filter((line) => line.trim().length > 0) : [],
451:       patch: patch.length > maxBytes ? patch.slice(0, maxBytes) : patch,
452:       truncated: patch.length > maxBytes,
453:     };
454:   }
455: 
456:   throw new PolicyError('invalid_tool', 'Unsupported tool');
457: }

459: function createProvider(env: Env, payload: Record<string, unknown>, providerName: string): AgentProvider {
460:   if (providerName === 'scripted') {
461:     const allowScriptedProvider = parseBooleanString(env.WORKSPACE_AGENT_ALLOW_SCRIPTED_PROVIDER, false);
462:     if (!allowScriptedProvider) {
463:       throw new PolicyError('scripted_provider_disabled', 'Scripted provider is disabled');
464:     }
465:     const scriptedActionsRaw = payload.scriptedActions;
466:     if (!Array.isArray(scriptedActionsRaw)) {
467:       return new ScriptedAgentProvider([]);
468:     }
469:     return new ScriptedAgentProvider(scriptedActionsRaw as AgentAction[]);
470:   }
471: 
472:   if (providerName === 'cloudflare_agents_sdk') {
473:     const endpoint = (env.AGENT_SDK_URL ?? '').trim();
474:     if (!endpoint) {
475:       throw new Error('AGENT_SDK_URL is required for cloudflare_agents_sdk provider');
476:     }
477:     const authToken = (env.AGENT_SDK_AUTH_TOKEN ?? '').trim() || null;
478:     return new CloudflareAgentSdkProvider(endpoint, authToken);
479:   }
480: 
481:   throw new Error(`Unsupported agent provider: ${providerName}`);
482: }

485:   const task = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
486:   if (!task) {

492: async function executeWorkspaceTask(
493:   env: Env,
494:   workspaceId: string,
495:   task: WorkspaceTaskResponse,
496:   payload: Record<string, unknown>,
497:   toolPolicy: TaskToolPolicy
498: ): Promise<void> {
499:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
500:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
501:     throw new Error('Workspace is not ready for task execution');
502:   }
503: 
504:   const provider = createProvider(env, payload, task.provider);
505:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
506:   const history: AgentHistoryEntry[] = [];
507:   const maxCommandTimeoutMs = parseIntegerString(
508:     env.WORKSPACE_AGENT_TIMEOUT_MS,
509:     toolPolicy.maxCommandTimeoutMs,
510:     1_000,
511:     toolPolicy.maxCommandTimeoutMs
512:   );
513: 
514:   await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
515:     workspaceId,
516:     taskId: task.id,
517:     eventType: 'task_started',
518:     payload: {
519:       provider: task.provider,
520:       model: task.model,
521:       attemptCount: task.attemptCount,
522:       maxSteps: task.maxSteps,
523:     },
524:   });
525: 
526:   for (let step = 1; step <= task.maxSteps; step += 1) {
527:     if (await isCancelRequested(env, workspaceId, task.id)) {
528:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, task.id, 'cancelled', {
529:         workspaceId,
530:         result: { reason: 'cancel_requested', step },
531:         errorCode: null,
532:         errorMessage: null,
533:       });
534:       try {
535:         await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
536:           workspaceId,
537:           taskId: task.id,
538:           eventType: 'task_cancelled',
539:           payload: { step },
540:         });
541:       } catch {
542:         // Best-effort event append after terminal status.
543:       }
544:       return;
545:     }
546: 
547:     const action = await provider.next({
548:       prompt: task.prompt,
549:       model: task.model,
550:       maxSteps: task.maxSteps,
551:       step,
552:       history,
553:     });
554: 
555:     if (action.type === 'final') {
556:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, task.id, 'succeeded', {
557:         workspaceId,
558:         result: { summary: action.summary, stepsExecuted: step - 1 },
559:         errorCode: null,
560:         errorMessage: null,
561:       });
562:       try {
563:         await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
564:           workspaceId,
565:           taskId: task.id,
566:           eventType: 'task_succeeded',
567:           payload: { summary: action.summary, stepsExecuted: step - 1 },
568:         });
569:       } catch {
570:         // Best-effort event append after terminal status.
571:       }
572:       return;
573:     }
574: 
575:     await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
576:       workspaceId,
577:       taskId: task.id,
578:       eventType: 'tool_call_started',
579:       payload: {
580:         step,
581:         tool: action.tool,
582:       },
583:     });
584: 
585:     const toolOutput = await executeTool(sandbox, action, maxCommandTimeoutMs, toolPolicy);
586:     history.push({ role: 'assistant', content: `tool:${action.tool}` });
587:     history.push({ role: 'tool', tool: action.tool, output: toolOutput });
588: 
589:     await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
590:       workspaceId,
591:       taskId: task.id,
592:       eventType: 'tool_call_completed',
593:       payload: {
594:         step,
595:         tool: action.tool,
596:         output: toolOutput,
597:       },
598:     });
599:   }
600: 
601:   throw new PolicyError('max_steps_exceeded', `Task exceeded maximum step count (${task.maxSteps})`);
602: }

604: export async function processWorkspaceTask(env: Env, workspaceId: string, taskId: string): Promise<void> {
605:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceTaskForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
606:   if (!claimed) {
607:     const existing = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
608:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
609:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace task is already running; defer redelivery');
610:     }
611:     return;
612:   }
613:   let task: WorkspaceTaskResponse | null = null;
614:   try {
615:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
616:     if (!flags.workspaceAgentRuntimeEnabled) {
617:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, taskId, 'failed', {
618:         workspaceId,
619:         errorCode: 'workspace_agent_runtime_disabled',
620:         errorMessage: 'Workspace agent runtime is disabled',
621:       });
622:       await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
623:         workspaceId,
624:         taskId,
625:         eventType: 'task_failed',
626:         payload: {
627:           code: 'workspace_agent_runtime_disabled',
628:           message: 'Workspace agent runtime is disabled',
629:         },
630:       });
631:       return;
632:     }
633: 
634:     task = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
635:     if (!task) {
636:       return;
637:     }
638: 
639:     const payload = await getWorkspaceTaskRequestPayload(env.DB, taskId);
640:     const toolPolicyInput = await getWorkspaceTaskToolPolicy(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
641:     if (!payload) {
642:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, taskId, 'failed', {
643:         workspaceId,
644:         errorCode: 'task_not_found',
645:         errorMessage: 'Workspace task payload no longer exists',
646:       });
647:       return;
648:     }
649: 
650:     const toolPolicy = normalizeToolPolicy(toolPolicyInput);
651:     await executeWorkspaceTask(env, workspaceId, task, payload, toolPolicy);
652:   } catch (error) {
653:     const freshTask = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
654:     const attemptCount = freshTask?.attemptCount ?? task?.attemptCount ?? 0;
655:     const maxRetries = freshTask?.maxRetries ?? task?.maxRetries ?? 0;
656: 
657:     if (freshTask?.cancelRequestedAt) {
658:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, taskId, 'cancelled', {
659:         workspaceId,
660:         result: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
661:         errorCode: null,
662:         errorMessage: null,
663:       });
664:       await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
665:         workspaceId,
666:         taskId,
667:         eventType: 'task_cancelled',
668:         payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
669:       });
670:       return;
671:     }
672: 
673:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
674:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, taskId, 'failed', {
675:         workspaceId,
676:         errorCode: error.code,
677:         errorMessage: error.message,
678:       });
679:       await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
680:         workspaceId,
681:         taskId,
682:         eventType: 'task_failed',
683:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message },
684:       });
685:       return;
686:     }
687: 
688:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {
689:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, taskId, 'queued', {
690:         workspaceId,
691:         startedAt: null,
692:         finishedAt: null,
693:         errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
694:         errorMessage: sanitizeErrorMessage(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)),
695:       });
696:       await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
697:         workspaceId,
698:         taskId,
699:         eventType: 'task_retry_scheduled',
700:         payload: {
701:           attemptCount,
702:           maxRetries,
703:         },
704:       });
705:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace task transient failure; retry requested');
706:     }
707: 
708:     const message = sanitizeErrorMessage(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
709:     await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, taskId, 'failed', {
710:       workspaceId,
711:       errorCode: 'task_execution_failed',
712:       errorMessage: message,
713:     });
714:     await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
715:       workspaceId,
716:       taskId,
717:       eventType: 'task_failed',
718:       payload: {
719:         code: 'task_execution_failed',

parts.text:
Found two issues worth fixing before shipping:

- **Medium – configured file path policy is never enforced**
  - `defaultToolPolicy()` stores `filePaths` rules (`root`, `deny`) in task policy, but runner-side normalization drops them entirely, so runtime behavior ignores those DB-configured path constraints.
  - Evidence: `packages/worker/src/api/workspace-tasks.ts:164` defines `filePaths`, while `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-task-runner.ts:160` only parses `commands`/`limits`.
  - Impact: policy changes to path restrictions won’t take effect, which weakens the “runtime policy enforcement” goal and can create a false sense of protection.

- **Low – allowlisted single-token commands cannot take args**
  - `enforceCommandPolicy()` only permits exact match for allowlist entries without spaces, so `ls -la`/`ls src` are denied even though `ls` is allowlisted.
  - Evidence: allowlist includes `ls` in `packages/worker/src/api/workspace-tasks.ts:161`, but matching logic in `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-task-runner.ts:366` only does exact equality for single-word entries.
  - Impact: legitimate command usage is unexpectedly blocked; likely to cause confusing agent failures.

I also attempted to run tests, but local `npm` is broken in this environment (module resolution error from npm CLI), so I validated via static review only.
